query: "gas prices" OR "gasoline prices" OR "oil prices" OR petrol

articles.title: Stocks tick higher, even as oil prices continue climb
articles.description: NEW YORK -- U.S. stocks ticked higher Wednesday following strong profit reports from BlackRock and other big companies. The tentative gains came as oil prices swung to their highest levels in a month because of the war with Iran.

articles.title: Forget EVs, this could save petrol cars
articles.description: Some of the world's biggest carmakers, engineering and petrol companies are joining forces to save petrol-powered cars.

articles.title: Stocks to buy: Nagaraj Shetti recommends LIC, RACL Geartech shares to buy in the short-term
articles.description: Indian benchmark indices saw minor gains on Thursday, fueled by IT stocks despite financial sector weaknesses. Nifty 50 rose 0.30% while BSE Sensex increased by 0.38%. Geopolitical tensions and rising crude oil prices weigh on investor sentiment, keeping market movements range-bound.

articles.title: First E20 Petrol Consumer Case: Raipur Forum Orders Compensation To Car Owner Over Fuel Damage Claim
articles.description: A Raipur consumer commission has reportedly ruled in favour of a car owner who alleged that E20 petrol caused repeated vehicle problems, including engine issues and mileage decline. The forum directed the manufacturer and dealer to pay repair costs and compensation. The ruling comes amid ongoing debate over ethanol-blended fuel

articles.title: First consumer court verdict on E20 petrol: Maruti Suzuki ordered to replace car
articles.description: The court ordered the company to either replace the vehicle with an E20-compatible model or provide a full refund of over ₹20 lakh, plus compensation for harassment

articles.title: Iran war leaves crisis-weary European airlines ready for a shakeout
articles.description: As renewed conflict in the Gulf drives up oil prices, airline investors and industry executives see mounting signs that Europe's financially ​weaker carriers may be headed for a shakeout.
